历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12790 → 21301 → 16418 → 19462 → 32585, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, due to subject selection grouping effects, there was an abnormal sharp drop (the minimum ranking for the no-restriction group reached 32585), moving back about 13123 places compared to 2024, with significant fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 32585. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Physics Category was 101 in 2021, 102 in 2022, 102 in 2023, 103 in 2024, and 102 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 99, a reduction of 3 students (about -2.9%) compared to 2025. This slight reduction in enrollment slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 113th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 99 and 113, overall stable. In reputation and public opinion documents, no significant negative or positive events were found; public opinion is stable. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 50th (relatively popular), short video exposure is moderate, and application attention is average. No obvious admission gaps were recorded. The university's fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's science and engineering orientation. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,400 (3.3%) compared to 2025 (about 379,600). Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates (about 68.6%), it is estimated that there will be about 269,000 Physics Category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 8,600 compared to 2025 (260,400), intensifying competition. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning, not a local university in Guangxi, so cross-province application requires consideration of regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal sharp drop in 2025 rankings, there is pressure for a rebound (odd-even year effect), along with a slight reduction in enrollment in 2026 and an increase in local candidates. It is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will rebound compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases), but still higher than the 2024 level. The predicted minimum ranking is about 31810, with a range of 31310 to 32310.
